title: McAlive:Leaves
body:
### There are two versions of the resource pack:
**Height**-Animation speed is based on height-Requires [continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or optifine (the higher the faster will the animation be)

**Normal**-Animation speed is the same no matter the height




### Optional [LeafyLeaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcaliveleafy-leaves) addon (may cause peformance issues)
![Leafy leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65f828661c9044a4b39f674443f5f18f4b1a186f.png)

**Check out the trailer below!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h_THuug1UWk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
